prompt: A photorealistic scene of a massive metallic rocket hovering horizontally at a very low altitude over a residential neighborhood with palm trees. The side of the silver spacecraft clearly displays the text SPACEX. Bright orange flames and thick smoke erupt from the rear engines. The foreground features a dark concrete rooftop, while the background shows small multi-story buildings nestled among tropical vegetation under hazy sunset lighting, creating a surreal juxtaposition of advanced aerospace technology and everyday life.
